children.name: div
children.textContent: You enter the magnificent Library of Alexandria. Ancient scrolls line every wall, and the air carries the scent of old parchment and mystery. A robed librarian materializes from the shadows.

children.name: div
children.textContent: "Ah, a new scholar! To access the forbidden scrolls, you must prove your historical knowledge. Answer wisely, young one!"

children.name: div
children.textContent: Which ancient civilization is credited with building the Great Pyramids of Giza?

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="15" height="11" viewBox="0 0 15 11" fill="none"><rect x="0" y="7" width="3" height="4" rx="1" fill="#F1F0FF"/><rect x="4" y="4.5" width="3" height="6.5" rx="1" fill="#F1F0FF"/><rect x="8" y="2" width="3" height="9" rx="1" fill="#F1F0FF"/><rect x="12" y="0" width="3" height="11" rx="1" fill="#F1F0FF"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Emma's group is taking on Dragon's Math Peak! Join for bonus XP and collaboration rewards.
